mapper.select: SELECT option_id, field_id, option_value, option_label, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM ticket_custom_field_option WHERE field_id=#{fieldId} ORDER BY sort_order, option_id

SELECT option_id, field_id, option_value, option_label, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM ticket_custom_field_option WHERE field_id=#{fieldId} AND status='0' ORDER BY sort_order, option_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_custom_field_option (field_id, option_value, option_label, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{fieldId}, #{optionValue}, #{optionLabel}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_custom_field_option SET status='1', update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=NOW() WHERE field_id=#{fieldId}
